name: bymax-claude-code
description: A complete, production-ready toolkit for Claude Code: planning workflow (spec → roadmap → phase-tasks → task), quality gates (TDD + code-review + security-review), specialized review agents, project bootstrap with strict ESLint/Prettier/TypeScript, and battle-tested templates. Stack templates for Next.js, Expo / React Native, Vite + React, and Node backends.

plugins.name: bymax-workflow
plugins.description: Spec → Roadmap → Phase-Tasks → Task — a phased planning + execution workflow with explicit user-approval gates and JIRA-style task dashboards. Includes /brainstorm, /plan, /verify, /checkpoint, and the universal /standards reference.

plugins.name: bymax-quality
plugins.description: Quality gates: /code-review (CRITICAL → LOW severity, blocks suppression comments), /tdd (red-green-refactor), the multi-stack `tester` skill, six specialist sub-agents, and two pre/post hooks (secret-scanner, console-log-scan).

plugins.name: bymax-bootstrap
plugins.description: Scaffold new projects (Next.js, Expo/RN, Vite+React, Node) with strict TS, ESLint flat-config + security plugin, Prettier, .vscode (format-on-save), Husky + commitlint + lint-staged, and CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/README.md templates. Also upgrades existing projects non-destructively.

plugins.name: bymax-mobile
plugins.description: Slash commands to boot the iOS Simulator (/sim-ios) and Android Emulator (/sim-android) for Expo / React Native projects. Auto-detects whether to reattach Metro (fast) or run a full rebuild + install (slow). Honors $BYMAX_SIM_IOS, $BYMAX_SIM_ANDROID, and $APP_VARIANT.

plugins.name: bymax-all
plugins.description: Meta-plugin reference. Claude Code does not auto-install dependencies — install bymax-workflow, bymax-quality, bymax-bootstrap, and bymax-mobile individually for the full toolkit.
